records.m_Talk_ENG: So this is the client's mansion... It's massive, just like the rumors said it was.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wow... Our office is tiny compared to here...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course it is. Our lady is the richest in town!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course it is. Our lady is the richest in town!

records.m_Talk_ENG: She even prepares my own snacks every day!

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's because you keep stealing hers.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's because you keep stealing hers.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And just as I'm talking, you ate our lady's snacks again?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: And just as I'm talking, you ate our lady's snacks again?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: And just as I'm talking, you ate our lady's snacks again?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oww! Don't hit me when I'm eating!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're all here. Nice to see you, Detective!

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Hey, Kyle. Don't tell me that they don

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't believe anyone is ignorant enough to not know who you are, Miss Lin.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't believe anyone is ignorant enough to not know who you are, Miss Lin.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't believe anyone is ignorant enough to not know who you are, Miss Lin.

records.m_Talk_ENG: They are... detectives still.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They are... detectives still.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They are... detectives still.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh...? He looks just like Karin!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh...? He looks just like Karin!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh...? He looks just like Karin!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Their personalities and way of speaking are so similar that it cannot be a coincidence. Hey, have you hidden your brother all these years?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Their personalities and way of speaking are so similar that it cannot be a coincidence. Hey, have you hidden your brother all these years?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Their personalities and way of speaking are so similar that it cannot be a coincidence. Hey, have you hidden your brother all these years?

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-what?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-what?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-what?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: How brazen of you to make such rude remarks.
records.m_Talk_DEU: How brazen of you to make such rude remarks.
records.m_Talk_FRA: How brazen of you to make such rude remarks.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In what world do I look like him?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: In what world do I look like him?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: In what world do I look like him?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: This will not do, Miss Lin. I do not trust those people one bit.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This will not do, Miss Lin. I do not trust those people one bit.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This will not do, Miss Lin. I do not trust those people one bit.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Shall I take the liberty to call the cops?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Shall I take the liberty to call the cops?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Shall I take the liberty to call the cops?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll stop speaking nonsense.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll stop speaking nonsense.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll stop speaking nonsense.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We are busy with urgent matters, so how about you serve us some tea?
records.m_Talk_DEU: We are busy with urgent matters, so how about you serve us some tea?
records.m_Talk_FRA: We are busy with urgent matters, so how about you serve us some tea?

records.m_Talk_ENG: In addition to being rude to your guests, you're poor at hospitality. You give butlers a bad name.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In addition to being rude to your guests, you're poor at hospitality. You give butlers a bad name.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In addition to being rude to your guests, you're poor at hospitality. You give butlers a bad name.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And you give detectives a bad name by failing to catch the phantom thief.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And you give detectives a bad name by failing to catch the phantom thief.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And you give detectives a bad name by failing to catch the phantom thief.

records.m_Talk_ENG: H-how did you know about that...?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: H-how did you know about that...?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: H-how did you know about that...?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Both of you, enough. We are not here to fight.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Plus, only siblings would fight like that...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Plus, only siblings would fight like that...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Plus, only siblings would fight like that...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hold your tongue!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hold your tongue!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hold your tongue!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't question your skills as detectives, so don't worry.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't question your skills as detectives, so don't worry.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't question your skills as detectives, so don't worry.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've heard enough of your genius criminal-catching detective skills to know.
